itemDescription:
A queen rules her kingdom with the utmost severity. She wants to control everything and everyone - even the uncontrollable. Unfortunately, she can’t look beyond the borders of her kingdom, but there reigns her old rival, the dragon. So what to do?

Sure, you look for the seven most spirited heroes of the kingdom, offer them gold and silver, put the most dangerous weapon of all time in their hands and hope for success.

No sooner said than done – the Seven are quickly convinced and approach the dangerous search beyond. Once arrived, everything turns out to be different to what was expected. The instrument that allowed you to look beyond emerges as a deadly threat.
